hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *design-tokens*.json|*tokens.json) python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); tokens=[k for k in data if not k.startswith(chr(36))] if isinstance(data,dict) else []; print(f\"✓ Valid design tokens: {len(tokens)} root keys\") if tokens else print(\"⚠ No tokens found\")" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "✓ Token file saved";; esac; true'
